bio: Aoishe Quaid is a scientist in the Elite Dangerous universe, active from 3301-09-20
  to 3301-09-20. The Federal research programme studying anomalous extraterrestrial
  objects was abruptly terminated by Fort Harrison station governor Aoishe Quaid only
  one week after its inauguration. Sources suggested Quaid was pressured into the
  decision despite her enthusiasm for the project.
